dry_ice_regulation_set.description: indicates dry ice shipment option [CFR = For HazMat regulated by US Dept of Transportation within the U.S. or ground shipments to Canada, IATA = For Worldwide Air movement]

box_shape.description: DEPRECATED: USE PACKAGES. ups box options [01 - UPS Letter, 02 - Customer Supplied Package, 03 - Tube, 04 - PAK, 2a - Small Express Box, 2b - Medium Express Box, 2c - Large Express Box, 24 - UPS 25KG Box, 25 - UPS 10KG Box]

declared_value.description: DEPRECATED: USE PACKAGES. Package level declared value for UPS

description.description: DEPRECATED: USE PACKAGES. Package level description, required for return label creation

dry_ice_weight.description: DEPRECATED: USE PACKAGES. Dry ice weight in ounces, required for dry ice shipments

purchase_order_number.description: Customs level purchase order number reference

reference_number.description: Package level reference, not always necessarily a number

weight.description: DEPRECATED: USE PACKAGES. Weight in ounces

length.description: DEPRECATED: USE PACKAGES. Length in inches

width.description: DEPRECATED: USE PACKAGES. Width in inches

height.description: DEPRECATED: USE PACKAGES. Height in inches

box_shape.description: ups box options [01 - UPS Letter, 02 - Customer Supplied Package, 03 - Tube, 04 - PAK, 2a - Small Express Box, 2b - Medium Express Box, 2c - Large Express Box, 24 - UPS 25KG Box, 25 - UPS 10KG Box]

declared_value.description: Package level declared value for UPS

description.description: Package level description, required for return shipments

dry_ice_regulation_set.description: indicates dry ice shipment option [CFR = For HazMat regulated by US Dept of Transportation within the U.S. or ground shipments to Canada, IATA = For Worldwide Air movement]

dry_ice_weight.description: Dry ice weight in ounces, required for dry ice shipments

reference_number.description: Package level reference, not always necessarily a number

weight.description: weight of the package in ounces

package_bill_type.description: required for shoptimeintransit rates: document, non-document, wwef pallet, or domestic pallet. describes the contents of the package.

return.description: For orders, determines whether the originating and destination addresses will be swapped for a return label request

usps_endorsement.description: Required for UPS Mail Innovations shipments

ship_from.description: The ship_from address is used as the originating address of the rate and label request.

ship_to.description: The to address is used as the destination address of a return order rate and label request.

warehouse_id.description: Currently ignored. Previously used for updating a warehouse for the ship_from address on an order.

cost_center.description: The Cost Center code for UPS Mail Innovations shipments
